title: fix(data): normalize cached FineWeb paths
author: RolanH

data.description: Normalizes handling of cached FineWeb remote path prefixes when resolving manifest, docs, dataset, and tokenizer downloads into local cache directories.

novel_contributions: Normalized MATCHED_FINEWEB_REMOTE_ROOT_PREFIX handling across manifest, docs, dataset, and tokenizer downloads
Stripped full multi-segment remote prefixes before mapping files into local cache directories
Added regression tests for nested remote prefixes and empty-prefix manifest resolution
